topic: selective hand harvesting and fruit quality
trigger_keywords: la vendimia manual permite seleccionar racimos individualmente y mejora la calidad

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Harvest workers inspect and select individual bunches by hand.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Damaged, diseased, underripe, or otherwise unsuitable bunches can be rejected before they enter the winery.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The winery receives a more uniform and sound fruit selection, supporting cleaner flavours and the intended quality level.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The winery receives a more uniform and sound fruit selection, supporting cleaner flavours and the intended quality level.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
